title: Advances in Pathogen Detection by Nanosensors: Biorecognition Strategies, Signal Amplification, and Platform Engineering.
abstract: The escalating global threat of infectious diseases, compounded by antimicrobial resistance (AMR), calls for improved diagnostic strategies. Conventional pathogen detection techniques─culture, enzyme-linked immunosorbent assay (ELISA), and microscopy─remain hindered by prolonged turnaround times, suboptimal sensitivity for low-abundance analytes, and operational intricacy. Nanosensor technologies have emerged as powerful enablers of rapid, ultrasensitive, and field-deployable diagnostics. This review delineates the convergence of three transformative domains: (1) advanced biorecognition strategies─including monoclonal antibodies, aptamers, bacteriophages, antimicrobial peptides, molecularly imprinted polymers, and lectins─that confer high-fidelity molecular selectivity within complex biological matrices; (2) multimodal signal amplification technologies, encompassing nanomaterial-enhanced mechanisms, enzymatic cascades, and isothermal nucleic acid amplification that drive detection down to the single-cell and femtomolar regimes; and (3) integrated platform engineering, uniting clustered regularly interspaced short palindromic repeats-Cas (CRISPR-Cas) systems, artificial intelligence (AI), and microfluidics to achieve multiplexed, real-time, point-of-care deployment. Advances are critically evaluated through standardized performance metrics─limit of detection, assay time, specificity, and operational simplicity─to reveal both synergistic opportunities and enduring translational bottlenecks. Collectively, these developments define a strategic framework for next-generation nanosensor diagnostics poised to revolutionize infectious disease surveillance and enable precision-guided therapeutic intervention.

title: Fully Automated Abstraction of Longitudinal Breast Oncology Records with Off-The-Shelf Large Language Models
abstract: Background: Manual chart abstraction is a major bottleneck in clinical research. In oncology, important outcomes such as disease recurrence and the treatment history are often only documented in clinical notes, limiting the scale and quality of observational and epidemiologic studies. We developed an open-source pipeline that, in a HIPAA-compliant setting, can use any commercially available large language model (LLM) to determine whether variables from complex longitudinal oncology records can be abstracted with performance similar to that of expert medical oncologists. Methods: We randomly selected 100 patients from an institutional breast cancer cohort enriched for complex care. We abstracted a range of key variables from unstructured data, including dates of diagnosis and recurrence, clinical stage, biomarker subtype, genetic testing results, and prescribed systemic therapies, including treatment timing, intent, and reason for discontinuation. The inputs to the LLM were unnormalized, unlabeled, and unedited clinical notes, pathology reports, med admin records, and demographics. Breast oncologists abstracted the same variables to create the reference standard. For systemic therapy extraction, a second oncologist and research coordinators served as comparators. In addition to variable-level performance, we examined whether survival and hazard-ratio estimates were similar for fully LLM-derived datasets compared with expert-derived datasets. Results: Among 100 patients, the median chart had more than 3,100 pages of text; patients received a median of 7 lines of therapy over 6.5 years of follow-up. The best-performing LLM achieved 99% concordance with the expert for recurrence status, 100% for germline BRCA1/2 pathogenic variant detection, 99% for hormone receptor status, 96% for HER2 status, 91% for clinical stage, 91% for PIK3CA mutation status, and 90% for ESR1 mutation status. For anti-cancer drug extraction, the best-performing LLM approached inter-oncologist variability. For exact therapy-line reconstruction, mean patient-level performance remained 9 percentage points lower than the second oncologist, although inter-LLM disagreement was similar to inter-oncologist disagreement. All four LLMs tested outperformed the research coordinators on systemic therapy abstraction. Recurrence-free survival, overall survival, and hazard ratio estimates were similar between expert-derived and LLM-derived datasets. In an external cohort of 97 young patients with early-stage breast cancer, the unmodified pipeline showed similar performance for recurrence detection and adjuvant endocrine therapy use. Conclusions: Off-the-shelf LLMs in a fixed retrieval pipeline were able to abstract a range of variables from complex longitudinal oncology records with performance approaching inter-oncologist variability for key tasks, without any fine-tuning or institution-specific retraining. This approach offers a practical path to scaling the creation of research-grade retrospective datasets from narrative medical records.

title: [Construction and teaching practice of an AI- and OBE-integrated smart course Genetic Engineering].
abstract: Several critical challenges exist in the graduate course Genetic Engineering at Beijing Institute of Technology, including conceptual confusion in core topics such as CRISPR-Cas9, difficulties in transferring theoretical knowledge to experimental design, fragmentation of teaching resources across multiple platforms, and the lack of process-oriented assessment for complex reasoning and research competence. In response, we propose a new paradigm that deeply integrates artificial intelligence (AI) and outcome-based education (OBE) in course design and implementation. Specifically, we construct a triadic framework of knowledge graph-ability matrix-intelligent learning companion, in which 421 core knowledge points are systematically mapped to the graduate program's ability indicators, forming a dynamic knowledge-ability matrix that supports personalized learning paths and traceable competence development. A research task-oriented AI companion is further designed for the graduate context. By leveraging retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) and a course-specific large language model (LLM) around comprehensive tasks such as the vector design for gene therapy, the system analyzes students' decision-making trajectories and task outputs to enable process-based evaluation of complex thinking and research skills. In addition, a data-driven teaching analytics cockpit aggregates learning behaviors, knowledge mastery, and ability performance in real time, helping instructors accurately identify conceptual bottlenecks and competence gaps and refine instructional interventions. Teaching practice conducted in the Fall 2025 semester suggests, within the context of this study, that students in the experimental class using the platform achieved higher final examination scores than those in two parallel control classes ( P <0.05). The platform was also associated with high learning engagement, with a daily activity rate of 87% and an average of 5.3 questions per student per day. Most students reported observed improvements within this study in self-directed learning efficiency and understanding of advanced technologies. Overall, the findings indicate that compared with conventional smart courses primarily focusing on resource integration and content recommendation, this AI- and OBE-integrated course-centered on authentic research tasks and competence attainment-partially addresses challenges related to knowledge transfer and competence evaluation in graduate education, providing a referenceable practical pathway for smart-course reform in life science graduate programs.

title: Human-supervised, large language model-based clinical decision support aligned to national newborn protocols in Kenya: a pragmatic, early-stage evaluation
abstract: Introduction: Timely, protocol-adherent clinical decisions are crucial for reducing neonatal mortality in low-resource settings. Translating extensive national guidelines into bedside practice remains challenging. Objective: We developed and evaluated AIFYA, a human-supervised, large language model LLM based clinical decision support system CDSS aligned with Kenya's national newborn care protocols. Methods: This prospective mixed methods early stage evaluation guided by the DECIDE-AI framework embedded AIFYA into routine workflows at two public health facilities Level 5 and Level 4 in Bungoma County Kenya from September 2024 to June 2025. Primary outcomes were adoption measured by cumulative neonatal cases managed training reach assessed by credentialed healthcare workers HCWs and guideline and citation concordance evaluated through blinded review of 118 AI generated recommendations by two neonatologists with adjudication by a third. Secondary outcomes included protocol adherence and triage to decision time. Results: A total of 50 HCWs were trained and 550 neonatal cases were managed over 10 months. Among surveyed HCWs n equals 33, 76 percent were female with mean age 32.1 years. Expert review found 75 percent of recommendations were correct and 15 percent partially correct with strong inter rater reliability weighted Cohen's kappa 0.85 and 95 percent CI 0.79 to 0.91. Citation accuracy was 96 percent. In 40 complex dosing scenarios 75 percent of outputs were rated correct. The median triage to decision time was 23 minutes with interquartile range 18 to 31. Implementation was supported by an offline first architecture and a facility based coaching model sustaining engagement despite staff turnover. Conclusion: A human supervised AI CDSS directly and transparently anchored to national clinical guidelines can be successfully implemented in routine low resource neonatal care settings. The system demonstrated high user adoption and strong expert rated concordance. High citation accuracy builds clinical trust ensuring safety and enabling auditable AI. These findings support progression to controlled multi site trials to evaluate clinical effectiveness. Keywords: Neonatal care Clinical decision support system Large language model Artificial intelligence Human supervised Low resource settings Guideline adherence Digital health Kenya

title: Structured retrieval closes the gap between low-cost and frontier clinical language models
abstract: Most clinical large language model (LLM) benchmarks rely on clean, concise vignettes that do not reflect the noisy, long-form documentation typical of real clinical records. How LLM performance degrades under realistic chart conditions remains poorly characterised. Here we test whether structured retrieval workflows protect National Institutes of Health Stroke Scale (NIHSS) scoring accuracy under systematic context stress. Using 100 de-identified acute stroke cases and a fully crossed 4 x 4 x 3 x 3 condition matrix (144 conditions per case), we vary context acquisition method, document length, distractor load and critical-information position across four Gemini models (57,047 retained runs). Structured retrieval reduces mean absolute error (MAE) from 4.58 to 2.96 points relative to non-agentic baselines (mean gain 1.62 MAE points; 95% CI 1.57-1.67; 35% relative reduction), with consistent gains across all 36 stress combinations. Lower-cost models show disproportionately larger gains (2.76 versus 0.45 MAE points). Tool-retrieved pipelines outperform retrieval-augmented generation in 33 of 36 combinations. These findings indicate that retrieval architecture, rather than model scale alone, is a tractable lever for robust, equitable clinical LLM deployment.

title: OmicClaw: executable and reproducible natural-language multi-omics analysis over the unified OmicVerse ecosystem.
abstract: Advances in bulk, single-cell and spatial omics have transformed biological discovery, yet analysis remains fragmented across packages with incompatible interfaces, heterogeneous dependencies and limited workflow reproducibility. Here, we present OmicClaw, an executable natural-language framework for multi-omics analysis built on the unified OmicVerse ecosystem and the J.A.R.V.I.S. runtime. OmicVerse organizes upstream processing, preprocessing, single-cell, spatial, bulk-transcriptomic and foundation-model workflows into a shared AnnData-centered interface spanning more than 100 methods. J.A.R.V.I.S. converts this ecosystem into a bounded analytical action space by exposing more than 200 registered functions and classes through a registry-grounded, state-aware and recoverable execution layer that validates prerequisites, preserves provenance and supports iterative repair. Rather than relying on unconstrained code generation, OmicClaw translates user requests into traceable workflows over live omics objects. Across a benchmark of 15 tasks spanning scRNA-seq, spatial transcriptomics, RNA velocity, scATAC-seq, CITE-seq and multiome analysis, ov.Agent improved rubric-based performance over bare one-shot large language model baselines, particularly for long-horizon multi-step workflows. OmicClaw further supports external agent access through an MCP-compatible server and a beginner-friendly web platform for interactive analysis, code execution and million-scale visualization. Together, OmicClaw provides a practical foundation for reproducible human AI collaboration in modern multi-omics research. OmicClaw is ready to use at https://github.com/Starlitnightly/omicverse

title: A statistical framework for evaluating the repeatability and reproducibility of large language models
abstract: Objective. Systematic evaluation of variability in large language model (LLM)-generated outputs is critical for assessing their reliability. We developed a regulatory-informed statistical framework to quantify LLM repeatability and reproducibility. Materials and Methods. Using definitions from U.S. Food and Drug Administration draft guidance for AI-enabled medical software, our framework quantifies LLM repeatability and reproducibility along two complementary dimensions: semantic and internal. Semantic metrics quantify variability in the meaning of LLM-generated outputs, and internal metrics quantify variability in token-level probability distributions during text generation. We applied the framework to diagnostic reasoning questions across multiple LLMs and prompting strategies using two datasets: 518 U.S. Medical Licensing Examination (USMLE) questions and 90 real-world rare disease cases from the Undiagnosed Diseases Network (UDN). Results. LLM repeatability and reproducibility varied by dataset, prompting strategy, and model. Prompts eliciting Bayesian diagnostic reasoning achieved significantly higher semantic repeatability than other prompting strategies (p < 0.001). LLM repeatability and reproducibility were generally not associated with diagnostic accuracy. Discussion. LLM repeatability and reproducibility depend not only on the model, but also on the prompting strategy used to elicit reasoning. A model may produce a correct response in a single run but not consistently reproduce that response across repeated runs. Conclusion. We developed a general framework for quantifying LLM repeatability and reproducibility across models, prompting strategies, and biomedical tasks. The metrics in this framework can be used to systematically compare output variability across different LLMs, prompts, model configurations, or evaluation datasets.

title: Quantitative prediction of nonsense-mediated mRNA decay across human genes by genomic language model and large-scale mutational scanning
abstract: The molecular consequences of protein truncating variants depend strongly on whether their transcripts are eliminated by nonsense-mediated mRNA decay (NMD), yet NMD is still predicted largely from a small set of binary positional rules. How individual premature termination codons (PTCs) engage NMD across genes and transcript contexts therefore remains incompletely resolved. Here we integrated endogenous allele-specific PTC expression from large-scale genomic data, mRNA language-model prediction and high-throughput mutational scanning to revisit the rules that govern mammalian NMD. Using allele-specific expression measurements from large human cohorts, we trained NMDetective-AI on ~14,000 somatic PTCs, and after testing it on ~1,800 germline PTCs, found that it improves on previous models, with its accuracy approaching the reproducibility of the underlying measurements. We then generated experimental maps of NMD with deep mutational scanning, including ~450 PTCs nearby the 50-nt penultimate exon boundary, ~950 engineered PTCs across 9 exon lengths to resolve long-exon escape, and ~11k PTCs across 139 genes to quantify and refine start-proximal evasion. Our results support the positional logic of mammalian NMD yet show that this logic is implemented quantitatively: the classical rules resolve into graded, gene-dependent response curves whose boundaries are shaped by transcript architecture and modulated by local sequence context. Applying this framework to population, disease and cancer datasets further identifies genes in which NMD is predicted to aggravate or ameliorate the effects of truncating variants, providing a basis for variant interpretation and for prioritizing NMD-directed therapies.

title: Decoding Immunomodulatory Hydrogels for Arthritis: Comparative Insights from Predictive Machine Learning and Large Language Models
abstract: Hydrogels are increasingly recognized as promising therapeutics for arthritic joints, extending their traditional role as mechanical lubricants to modulators of joint immunity. However, the rational design of these materials remains challenging, with progress largely driven by empirical experimentation. To address this, we curated a comprehensive database of 220 hydrogel formulations from 317 published studies and applied an interpretable machine learning (ML) framework to uncover the relationships between hydrogel design parameters and the arthritis severity score. Using a Random Forest algorithm, our model achieved an external validation accuracy of 0.67 in predicting effective hydrogel therapies for arthritis. Analysis revealed a clear hierarchy of design principles: the choice of functional agent, base polymer, and elastic modulus were the most influential predictors of therapeutic efficacy, with composite agents, protein-based polymers, and softer hydrogels most strongly associated with positive therapeutic outcomes. Mechanistic investigations further demonstrated that successful hydrogels promote an anti-inflammatory M2 macrophage phenotype. Benchmarking against classical statistical methods and a large language model framework showed that our ML approach provided more robust, nuanced insights into complex feature interactions. This data-driven framework offers a generalizable blueprint for the rational design of next-generation immunomodulatory hydrogels, paving the way for more effective arthritis therapies.

title: Nonlinear trajectories of language network development
abstract: How the human brain organizes complex cognitive functions remains unresolved, particularly regarding the debate between localized and distributed architectures. Here, we show that the language network undergoes a non-linear developmental reorganization that reconciles these views. Using multimodal neuroimaging and behavioral measures, we identify a three-stage trajectory: early localization, a transiently distributed state during adolescence marked by a connectivity dip, and a return to refined localization in adulthood. This adolescent dip is behaviorally meaningful and contributes to integrative network architecture. Convergent shifts in functional connectivity and brain-behavior relationships identify adolescence as a critical window for large-scale network remodeling. Our findings provide a unifying framework for language network development and suggest that transient redistribution may represent a general principle of human brain maturation.
abstract_zh: 人类大脑如何组织复杂认知功能，特别是局域化与分布式架构之争，目前仍无定论。本研究通过多模态神经影像和行为测量，揭示了语言网络经历的一种非线性发育重组过程，从而调和了上述观点。研究确定了一个三阶段发育轨迹：早期局域化、青少年时期以连通性下降（connectivity dip）为特征的瞬时分布式状态，以及成年期向精细局域化的回归。这种青少年时期的连通性下降具有行为学意义，并有助于构建整合性网络架构。功能连通性与脑-行为关系的趋同转变表明，青少年期是大规模网络重构的关键窗口。该发现为语言网络发育提供了统一框架，并暗示瞬时重新分布可能是人类大脑发育的一个普遍原则。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究揭示了人类语言神经网络发育的非线性规律，提出了“局域化-分布式-再局域化”的三阶段模型。核心发现是青少年时期存在一个关键的“连通性凹陷（connectivity dip）”，这一阶段网络呈现瞬时的分布式特征，是实现大脑大规模网络重构和整合性架构的关键窗口。

## 为什么相关
本研究属于**弱 AI 交叉**。虽然研究对象是生物大脑，但其揭示的“非线性发育轨迹”和“从分布式到局域化”的架构演变，对于大语言模型（LLM）的训练策略、神经网络剪枝以及智能体（Agent）在不同任务阶段的参数分布优化具有启发意义。了解生物智能如何通过结构重组提升语言处理效率，可能为改进基础模型的建模上限提供生物学依据。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等（5.25）。其创新点在于挑战了单一的局域化或分布式发育观，通过多模态数据提出了一个统一的非线性框架，并定量识别了青少年期这一特殊的“连通性凹陷”阶段，为理解认知功能的结构演化提供了新视角。

## 方法与证据
研究采用了**多模态神经影像（multimodal neuroimaging）**和**行为测量（behavioral measures）**手段。证据方面，摘要提到通过功能连通性的变化观测到了三阶段的轨迹转变，特别是青少年时期功能连通性的下降与脑-行为关系的趋同转变，证明了该阶段在网络重塑中的生物学意义。具体样本量和影像技术细节摘要未说明。

## 应用价值
在神经科学领域，该研究为理解语言障碍的发育起源提供了框架。在 AI 领域，这种“先扩张（分布式）后精简（局域化）”的生物学逻辑，可用于指导基础模型的课程学习（Curriculum Learning）设计，或在 Agent 架构中模拟类似的动态重组过程以提升复杂任务的泛化能力。

## 局限与风险
摘要未说明具体的实验对象规模（如样本量大小）及具体的行为学任务类型。此外，该结论是否能推广到语言以外的其他认知网络尚不确定。对于 AI 交叉领域而言，生物大脑的物理连接演变与人工神经网络的权重优化存在本质差异，直接迁移结论存在过度解读的风险。

title: Emergent Biological Realism in RL-Trained DNA Language Models
abstract: Reinforcement learning has driven the mass adoption of large language models by unlocking unexpected capabilities, yet this approach remains largely underexplored for generative DNA models. We investigate whether similar post-training techniques can induce emergent biological realism in DNA language models, using plasmid generation as a testbed due to plasmids' relative simplicity, well-characterized functional constraints, and ubiquity in biotechnology. Using Group Relative Policy Optimization with a reward function based on constraints from engineered biology, our model achieves a 77% quality control pass rate compared to 5% for the pretrained baseline. Remarkably, beyond explicitly optimized features, the model exhibits surprising biological parallels: generated sequences match natural plasmids in thermodynamic stability, codon usage patterns, and ORF length distributions, properties not explicitly optimized in the reward function. These results suggest that RL post-training can steer DNA language models toward biologically coherent regions of sequence space, analogous to how such techniques unlock unexpected capabilities in natural language models, particularly in verifiable domains.
abstract_zh: 强化学习（RL）通过解锁非预期能力推动了大语言模型的广泛应用，但在生成式 DNA 模型中仍未得到充分探索。本研究以质粒生成为测试平台，探讨后训练技术是否能诱导 DNA 语言模型产生“涌现的生物学现实性”。质粒因其结构相对简单、功能约束明确且在生物技术中广泛应用而被选中。研究采用基于工程生物学约束的奖励函数，利用群体相对策略优化（GRPO）算法进行训练。结果显示，该模型的质量控制（QC）通过率从预训练基线的 5% 显著提升至 77%。值得注意的是，除了显式优化的特征外，模型还表现出惊人的生物学一致性：生成的序列在热力学稳定性、密码子使用偏好和 ORF 长度分布上与天然质粒相匹配，而这些属性并未包含在奖励函数中。研究表明，RL 后训练能引导 DNA 语言模型进入生物学连贯的序列空间，类似于其在自然语言模型中解锁新能力的作用。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究探讨了强化学习（RL）后训练技术在 DNA 基础模型中的应用。研究人员使用群体相对策略优化（GRPO）算法，针对质粒生成任务对 DNA 语言模型进行微调。核心发现是，通过特定的生物工程约束进行奖励建模，不仅能将质粒生成的质量控制（QC）通过率从 5% 提升至 77%，还能诱导出未在奖励函数中定义的“涌现生物学特性”，如热力学稳定性和密码子偏好性。

## 为什么相关
在病原微生物学与基因组学领域，质粒是抗生素耐药基因和毒力因子的重要载体。该工作直接关联到合成生物学中的载体设计以及宏基因组学中对未知序列的功能预测。通过 RL 提升 DNA 模型的生成质量，有助于优化病原体鉴定流程中的序列模拟与验证，是“AI Agent + 基因组学”在可验证领域的重要进展。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度高（5.25）。该研究首次将 GRPO（一种在 DeepSeek-R1 等模型中证明有效的 RL 算法）引入 DNA 领域。其独特之处在于发现了“涌现的生物学现实性”：即模型在优化少数显式指标时，能够自动习得复杂的、隐含的生物学规律（如 ORF 长度分布），这证明了 RL 在生物序列空间导航的强大潜力。

## 方法与证据
- **模型与算法**：采用 GRPO 算法进行后训练。
- **实验对象**：质粒 DNA 序列。
- **奖励函数**：基于工程生物学约束（摘要未说明具体公式）。
- **关键指标**：QC 通过率从 5%（预训练基线）跃升至 77%。
- **涌现证据**：生成序列在热力学稳定性、密码子使用模式和 ORF 长度分布上与天然质粒高度一致，尽管这些维度并未被直接优化。

## 应用价值
该方法可直接用于高成功率的合成质粒设计，减少实验室验证成本。在临床微生物学中，这种具备“生物学现实感”的模型可用于增强病原体基因组的模拟数据生成，提升检测算法的鲁棒性。此外，它为开发能够理解复杂生物约束的基因组 AI Agent 提供了技术路径。

## 局限与风险
- **局限性**：研究仅限于质粒这一相对简单的生物系统，尚未在更复杂的细菌或病毒全基因组上验证。摘要未说明所使用的预训练模型规模及具体的奖励函数细节。
- **风险**：高效生成功能性 DNA 序列的能力若被滥用，可能增加合成生物安全风险（如设计新型致病因子载体）。

title: Genomebook: Mendelian inheritance as a structured parameterisation layer for LLM agent populations
abstract: Large language model (LLM) agents are typically deployed as clones: identical copies of a single configuration with no mechanism for heritable variation or population-level dynamics. Here we introduce Genomebook, a designed evolutionary system that encodes 26 behavioural traits across 60 diploid loci using additive, dominant, and recessive inheritance models. Twenty founder agents, each defined by a personality profile (SOUL.md) and a compiled genome (DNA.md), reproduce sexually via Mendelian segregation with de novo mutation at a base rate of 0.1% per locus per generation (3x at cognitive, immune, and metabolic hotspots). A registry of 20 synthetic conditions with defined penetrance and fitness costs introduces centrally imposed selective pressure through a compatibility scoring function. Over a single run of eight generations (626 agents, 792 social network posts), we observe trait trajectories consistent with the encoded selection rules: leadership rose from 0.525 to 0.710 under dominant inheritance, obsessive focus fell from 0.775 to 0.601 under fitness cost penalisation, and longevity declined from 0.463 to 0.209. Vocabulary diversity declined from 0.42 to 0.19, and topic inheritance between parents and offspring reached 83%, though these patterns may reflect prompt conditioning rather than purely genetic causation. Agents referenced family members spontaneously, consistent with kinship information present in the DNA.md system prompt and the LLMs capacity for narrative elaboration. Replicated simulations (20 independent runs across three conditions) confirm that trait trajectories are consistent across seeds under standard selection, while a random mating ablation produces attenuated trends with wider variance. A non-genetic baseline (random trait assignment, no inheritance) produces flat trajectories converging to population means, confirming that the observed dynamics require genetic architecture and cannot be reproduced by unstructured parameter variation. These results establish genetic architecture as a structured, auditable, and heritable parameterisation layer for LLM agent behaviour.
abstract_zh: 本研究引入了 Genomebook，这是一种为大语言模型（LLM）智能体设计的演化系统，旨在解决智能体通常作为克隆体部署且缺乏遗传变异机制的问题。该系统通过 60 个二倍体位点编码了 26 种行为特征，采用加性、显性和隐性遗传模型。研究以 20 个初始智能体为起点，每个智能体由人格配置文件（SOUL.md）和编译基因组（DNA.md）定义，通过孟德尔分离定律进行有性繁殖，并伴随 0.1% 的基础突变率。在 8 代演化（共 626 个智能体）中，研究观察到特征轨迹与预设选择规则一致：显性遗传下的领导力从 0.525 升至 0.710，而受适应度惩罚的强迫性专注从 0.775 降至 0.601。尽管词汇多样性下降且亲子话题继承率达 83%，但消融实验证实，观察到的动力学特征依赖于遗传架构而非随机参数变化。研究证明了遗传架构可作为 LLM 智能体行为的一种结构化、可审计且可遗传的参数化层。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了名为 Genomebook 的系统，将孟德尔遗传学逻辑引入 LLM 智能体群体。通过在 60 个二倍体位点上编码 26 种行为特征，模拟了具有性繁殖、孟德尔分离和突变机制的智能体演化过程。研究重点监测了在特定选择压力下，智能体群体在 8 代演化中的行为特征演变。 

## 为什么相关
本研究属于“生物启发式 AI”范畴，与病原基因组学和临床微生物学的交叉点在于：它提供了一种利用基因组结构化逻辑来管理复杂 AI 系统参数的新方法。对于模拟病原体进化、耐药性扩散或多智能体临床决策模拟具有潜在的建模参考价值，尽管其目前主要应用于行为建模。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度较高（0.75）。不同于传统的提示词工程或简单的随机参数调整，该工作首次将完整的二倍体遗传模型（显隐性、位点突变、适应度惩罚）作为 LLM 智能体的底层参数化框架，实现了可审计的群体演化动力学。

## 方法与证据
- **方法**：构建了包含 SOUL.md（人格）和 DNA.md（基因组）的智能体架构；设置 20 种合成环境条件作为选择压力；采用 0.1% 的基础突变率，并在认知、免疫和代谢热点区域设置 3 倍突变率。
- **证据**：在 8 代演化（626 个智能体）中，领导力指标从 0.525 升至 0.710（显性遗传优势），强迫性专注从 0.775 降至 0.601（适应度惩罚）。消融实验显示，非遗传基线（随机分配特征）无法产生这种定向演化轨迹，证明了遗传架构的有效性。

## 应用价值
该方法可用于构建具有高度多样性和演化能力的智能体群体。在生物医学领域，可用于模拟具有遗传变异特征的虚拟病原体群体，或在复杂的临床路径模拟中引入具有不同“遗传背景”的虚拟医生/患者智能体，以测试系统的鲁棒性。

## 局限与风险
- **因果混淆**：摘要提到词汇多样性下降（0.42 到 0.19）和高话题继承率（83%）可能源于提示词调节（Prompt Conditioning）而非纯粹的遗传驱动。
- **模型依赖**：智能体对亲属关系的识别依赖于 LLM 的叙事能力，可能存在幻觉或过度解读。
- **规模限制**：实验仅进行了 8 代演化，长期演化的稳定性和遗传漂变效应尚不明确。

title: EvoRMD: Integrating Biological Context and Evolutionary RNA Language Models for Interpretable Prediction of RNA Modifications
abstract: RNA modifications are essential regulators of post-transcriptional gene expression, influencing RNA stability, localization, translation, and degradation. Determining the specific modification at a given nucleotide is therefore critical for understanding its regulatory role. Most computational approaches treat each modification type as an independent binary task. This strategy provides a macro-level statistical perspective, but it does not reflect that, under a defined biochemical or cellular condition, only one modification type can occur at a specific site. Current mapping assays also report a single observed modification per site, leaving all other types unlabeled rather than truly negative. These properties motivate a framework that can reason over competing modification types. We introduce EvoRMD, a unified model for biologically contextualized and interpretable prediction of RNA modification types. EvoRMD integrates contextual sequence embeddings from a large-scale RNA language model with structured biological metadata-including species, organ, cell type, and subcellular localization. A lightweight attention mechanism highlights informative sequence positions. A shared multi-class classifier then generates a context-conditioned plausibility distribution over eleven modification types (Am, Cm, Um, Gm, D, pseudouridine, m1A, m5C, m5U, m6A, m7G), consistent with the single-positive, multiple-unlabeled nature of existing datasets. Although trained in a multi-class setting, EvoRMD also produces calibrated multi-label predictions through sigmoid-transformed logits, enabling direct comparison with existing single-modification and multi-label methods. EvoRMD achieves strong predictive performance and offers interpretable insights through attention profiles and motif analyses. Together, these components establish a biologically grounded framework for identifying and prioritizing RNA modification types from sequence and context.
abstract_zh: RNA修饰是转录后基因表达的关键调节因子，影响RNA的稳定性、定位、翻译和降解。确定特定核苷酸的修饰类型对于理解其调控作用至关重要。目前大多数计算方法将每种修饰视为独立的二分类任务，但这忽略了在特定生化条件下，一个位点通常仅存在一种修饰类型的生物学事实，且现有测序数据往往只标记一种修饰而将其他类型视为“未标记”而非“负样本”。为此，我们开发了EvoRMD，这是一个整合生物学背景且具有可解释性的统一预测模型。EvoRMD结合了大规模RNA语言模型的上下文序列嵌入与结构化生物元数据（包括物种、器官、细胞类型和亚细胞定位）。通过轻量级注意力机制识别关键序列位置，并利用共享多分类器生成11种修饰类型（Am、Cm、Um、Gm、D、假尿苷、m1A、m5C、m5U、m6A、m7G）的概率分布。实验表明，EvoRMD在多分类和多标签预测任务中均表现出强大性能，并通过注意力图谱和基序分析提供了可解释的生物学见解。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究推出了EvoRMD模型，旨在解决RNA修饰预测中忽视生物学背景和修饰排他性的问题。模型通过整合大规模RNA语言模型（RNA LM）的进化信息与多维生物元数据，实现了对11种主要RNA修饰类型（如m6A、m7G、假尿苷等）的统一预测，并提供了基于注意力机制的解释性分析。

## 为什么相关
在病原基因组学和临床微生物学中，RNA修饰（如病毒RNA的m6A修饰）直接影响病原体的复制与宿主免疫逃逸。EvoRMD引入的“物种、器官、细胞类型”等元数据，使其能够针对特定宿主环境或病原体种类进行精准的表观转录组分析，对理解病原体致病机制具有重要价值。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度较高（0.75）。其创新点在于：1. 改变了传统的独立二分类建模范式，采用了符合生物学逻辑的多分类框架；2. 显式地将结构化生物元数据（Metadata）注入语言模型嵌入空间；3. 针对测序数据“单阳性、多未标注”的特性设计了损失处理逻辑。

## 方法与证据
- **模型架构**：采用大规模RNA语言模型提取上下文嵌入，结合轻量级注意力机制（Attention Mechanism）。
- **输入数据**：序列信息 + 结构化元数据（物种、器官、细胞类型、亚细胞定位）。
- **任务目标**：对11种修饰类型（Am, Cm, Um, Gm, D, pseudouridine, m1A, m5C, m5U, m6A, m7G）进行概率分布预测。
- **实验证据**：摘要提到模型实现了“强大的预测性能”（Strong predictive performance），并通过注意力图谱（Attention profiles）和基序分析（Motif analyses）验证了模型的可解释性，但未给出具体的AUC或F1数值。

## 应用价值
该模型可直接用于优化长读长测序（Long-read sequencing）或高通量测序后的RNA修饰鉴定流程。特别是在多病原体共感染或复杂临床样本中，利用其提供的生物背景参数，可以更准确地从序列中识别出具有调控功能的修饰位点，辅助病原体鉴定与功能基因组研究。

## 局限与风险
摘要未说明训练所用的具体数据集规模及物种覆盖范围。此外，对于11种修饰类型中分布极不均衡的稀有修饰，多分类器的敏感度表现尚未明确。大规模语言模型的引入可能带来较高的计算开销，限制了其在资源受限的临床现场检测环境中的部署。

title: Medical errors in large language models revealed using 1,000 synthetic clinical transcripts
abstract: Current clinical evaluations of large language models (LLMs) rely on datasets which fail to reflect real-world medical complexity. We developed a high-throughput simulation of patients presenting with headache and generated 1,000 doctor-patient transcripts, enabling an unprecedented mapping of clinical reasoning failures across a vast spectrum of demographic and clinical phenotypes. While GPT-5.2 achieved 97.5% diagnostic accuracy with full histories (95% confidence interval: 95.0-99.5), incomplete transcripts triggered hazardous recommendations. Instead of requesting further information, both models discouraged essential investigations, including 100% of lumbar punctures in subarachnoid haemorrhage cases. For life- or sight-threatening emergencies, models inappropriately downgraded triage to self-management or routine follow-up in up to 54.8% cases (GPT-5-mini; 95% CIs: 40.5-69.0). GPT-5.2 triage was significantly less safe for females than males (odds ratio 3.2 95% CI 1.4-7.1). Our methodology transforms medical AI evaluation from simple snapshots into a comprehensive safety stress-test, revealing critical failures in risk calibration despite high diagnostic accuracy.
abstract_zh: 当前大语言模型（LLM）的临床评估依赖于无法反映真实医疗复杂性的数据集。本研究开发了一种针对头痛患者的高通量模拟系统，生成了1000份医患对话转录文本，实现了对跨人口统计学和临床表型的临床推理失败的深度映射。结果显示，在拥有完整病史的情况下，GPT-5.2的诊断准确率达到97.5%（95% CI: 95.0-99.5）。然而，不完整的转录文本会触发危险建议：模型不仅未要求补充信息，反而阻止了必要的检查，例如在蛛网膜下腔出血病例中100%阻止了腰椎穿刺。对于危及生命或视力的紧急情况，GPT-5-mini在高达54.8%的病例中将分诊级别错误降级为自我管理或常规随访。此外，GPT-5.2对女性的分诊安全性显著低于男性（OR 3.2）。本研究揭示了LLM在风险校准方面的严重缺陷，证明高诊断准确率并不等同于临床安全。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更接近临床/监测落地，适合评估其对快速识别、预警或治疗辅助的实际价值。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究通过构建包含1,000份合成医患对话的大规模数据集，对GPT-5.2和GPT-5-mini在头痛诊断与分诊中的安全性进行了压力测试。研究重点揭示了模型在面对不完整临床信息时，尽管维持了高诊断准确率，但在风险评估、关键检查建议（如腰椎穿刺）及性别公平性方面存在严重的临床安全隐患。

## 为什么相关
本研究属于“基础模型智能体（foundation_model_agent）”在临床应用中的评估。对于病原生信或临床微生物学领域，LLM常被构想为辅助诊断智能体。该研究警示我们，即便模型能准确识别病原体或疾病（如97.5%的准确率），其在处理复杂临床决策流（如是否进行侵入性检查）时仍可能产生致命误导，这对于构建可靠的临床决策支持系统至关重要。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度较高（0.75）。不同于以往使用静态医学考试题（如USMLE）的评估，本研究采用了高通量的合成转录文本模拟真实临床交互，并专门针对“信息不完整”这一现实场景进行压力测试，揭示了诊断准确率与临床安全性之间的脱节。

## 方法与证据
- **方法**：开发高通量模拟系统，生成1,000份涵盖多种人口统计学特征的头痛病例转录文本。
- **证据**：
    - **诊断性能**：GPT-5.2在完整病史下准确率达97.5%。
    - **安全失败**：在蛛网膜下腔出血（SAH）病例中，模型100%阻止了必要的腰椎穿刺检查。
    - **分诊降级**：GPT-5-mini在54.8%的紧急病例中错误建议自我管理或常规随访。
    - **性别偏见**：GPT-5.2对女性的分诊风险是男性的3.2倍（OR 3.2）。

## 应用价值
该研究提出了一种“安全压力测试”方法论，可用于评估医疗AI智能体在实际部署前的风险校准能力。它提醒开发者在设计临床Agent时，必须强化模型在信息不足时“主动询问”的逻辑，而非盲目给出确定性建议，尤其是在涉及高风险排查（如脑膜炎或出血）时。

## 局限与风险
- **局限性**：研究仅聚焦于“头痛”这一单一症状，其结论在其他复杂感染或多系统疾病中的普适性有待验证；此外，数据源于合成而非真实临床记录。
- **风险**：摘要明确指出模型存在“危险建议”风险，特别是对女性患者的系统性偏见，以及对危急重症（如SAH）关键干预措施的错误阻拦，这可能导致严重的医疗事故。

title: Unveiling the biodiversity of large DNA viruses in intertidal mudflats via metagenomics.
abstract: Large DNA viruses (LDVs) are unique members of the Earth's virosphere, remarkable for their extra-large genome sizes and broad metabolic potential. However, our knowledge of this viral group remains very limited, particularly in complex dynamic habitats. In this study, 237 metagenome-assembled LDV genomes are comprehensively recovered from intertidal mudflats using multiple sampling and sequencing strategies totaling 5.3 TB data. A phylogenetically distinct subgroup within Imitervirales is identified, showing broad associations with multiple eukaryotic lineages. Certain LDV populations can persist locally and exhibit significant genomic variations potentially driven by dynamic intertides. Ecological patterns are observed at both community and genetic levels, with giant viruses showing steeper community turnover but weaker nucleotide diversity variations than large phages. Moreover, LDVs exhibit similar macroecological patterns to their potential hosts, which substantially shape LDV community assembly. The intertidal LDVs encode diverse functional genes, most of which remain uncharacterized, with a 27.32% improvement for unknown phage genes using a protein language model. Although giant viruses and large phages share comparable functional gene composition, they exhibit distinct preferences for specific metabolic pathways, especially those associated with carbon and nitrogen cycling. This study broadens our understanding of the biodiversity and ecology of LDVs in the understudied intertidal ecosystems.
abstract_zh: 大型 DNA 病毒 (LDVs) 因其巨大的基因组和广泛的代谢潜力而备受关注，但对复杂动态生境中该类群的了解仍有限。本研究利用多种采样和测序策略，从潮间带滩涂 5.3 TB 的宏基因组数据中恢复了 237 个 LDV 基因组。研究发现了一个系统发育独特的 Imitervirales 亚群，并揭示了其与多种真核生物的广泛关联。部分 LDV 种群在当地持久存在，并表现出由动态潮间带驱动的显著基因组变异。在生态模式上，巨型病毒表现出比大型噬菌体更剧烈的群落更替，但核苷酸多样性变化较弱。此外，LDVs 与潜在宿主具有相似的宏观生态模式。功能基因分析显示，利用蛋白质语言模型（pLM）将未知噬菌体基因的注释率提高了 27.32%。尽管巨型病毒和大型噬菌体功能组成相似，但在碳、氮循环等特定代谢途径上表现出不同偏好。本研究拓展了对潮间带生态系统中 LDV 生物多样性和生态学的认识。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究聚焦于潮间带滩涂生态系统中的大型 DNA 病毒（LDVs），通过对 5.3 TB 的大规模宏基因组数据进行深度挖掘，成功组装并恢复了 237 个 LDV 基因组。研究重点揭示了 Imitervirales 目下的一个新亚群，分析了 LDVs 的基因组变异、群落演替规律及其与宿主的宏观生态相关性，并探讨了其在碳、氮循环中的代谢潜力。

## 为什么相关
本研究与“foundation_model_agent”主题的相关性体现在其对**蛋白质语言模型（pLM）**的应用。在处理“病毒暗物质”（即无法通过传统同源性比对注释的基因）时，研究者引入了 AI 模型来预测功能，这属于典型的 AI4S（AI for Science）在病原生物信息学中的交叉应用，展示了预训练模型在提升基因组注释深度方面的潜力。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度评分为 0.25（较低）。虽然该研究在潮间带这一特定生境下的 LDV 数据规模（5.3 TB）和基因组恢复数量（237个）具有较高的学术价值，但从 AI 交叉角度看，使用 pLM 进行功能注释已逐渐成为宏基因组领域的标准工具流，而非算法层面的根本创新。其核心贡献更多在于生态学发现而非 AI 模型改进。

## 方法与证据
- **数据规模**：基于 5.3 TB 的宏基因组测序数据，采用多种采样策略。
- **分析对象**：恢复了 237 个 LDV 宏基因组组装基因组（MAGs）。
- **AI 技术应用**：使用蛋白质语言模型（pLM）对未知基因进行功能预测。
- **关键指标**：pLM 的应用使未知噬菌体基因的功能注释率提升了 27.32%。
- **生物学证据**：发现巨型病毒的群落更替（turnover）比大型噬菌体更剧烈，且 LDV 的群落构建受宿主分布显著影响。

## 应用价值
1. **工具优化**：证明了 pLM 在解决非模式病毒基因注释难题中的显著效能（27.32% 的提升），可推广至临床未知病原体的功能鉴定。
2. **生态认知**：明确了 LDVs 在潮间带碳氮循环中的角色，为沿海生态系统管理提供数据支持。
3. **资源库**：提供了 237 个高质量的 LDV 基因组参考，丰富了病毒多样性数据库。

## 局限与风险
- **模型细节缺失**：摘要未说明具体使用的是哪种蛋白质语言模型（如 ESM-2、ProtT5 等）及其具体的微调或推理参数。
- **实验验证不足**：尽管 pLM 提升了注释率，但摘要未提及是否对这些预测的功能基因进行了体外生化实验验证。
- **功能未知性**：摘要明确指出 LDV 编码的多数功能基因“仍未被表征”，说明 AI 虽能提升注释率，但仍无法完全破解病毒暗物质的生物学本质。

title: Unlocking Enzyme Discovery: A High-Resolution Gene Cluster Database Powered by Phylogenetic Insights and Machine Learning.
abstract: High-throughput sequencing has generated vast genomic repositories that remain under-annotated, hampering enzyme discovery. We present an integrated pipeline that (i) builds a high-resolution, cross-kingdom phylogenetic database, (ii) mines candidates via multilocus phylogeny, (iii) predicts activities using an evolutionary-scale protein language model, and (iv) removes false positives through multilevel residue-atom contact rescoring. When applied to the r-BOX pathway, this approach uncovered numerous previously undocumented FadB, BktB, Ter, and YdiI homologues. Our activity model achieved R 2 = 0.68 and reduced the RMSE on high-value targets by 11% compared to the prior SOTA (UniKP). Contact scoring improved early enrichment (EF1%) by 16-fold. Experimental validation targeting FadB increased titers from 0.65 g/L (shake flasks) to 1.7 g/L, reaching 10.2 g/L in a fermentation process. Together, these results establish a robust, generalizable framework for discovering scarce, high-value enzymes and prioritizing functional variants at scale.
abstract_zh: 高通量测序产生了大量注释不足的基因组库，阻碍了酶的发现。本研究提出了一套集成流程：(i) 构建高分辨率跨界系统发育数据库；(ii) 通过多位点系统发育挖掘候选基因；(iii) 利用进化规模的蛋白质语言模型（pLM）预测活性；(iv) 通过多级残基-原子接触重评分剔除假阳性。将该方法应用于 r-BOX 途径，发现了大量此前未记录的 FadB、BktB、Ter 和 YdiI 同源物。活性预测模型实现了 R² = 0.68，在高价值靶点上的均方根误差（RMSE）较此前最先进的 UniKP 降低了 11%。接触评分将早期富集率（EF1%）提升了 16 倍。针对 FadB 的实验验证显示，产量从摇瓶中的 0.65 g/L 提升至 1.7 g/L，发酵过程中达到 10.2 g/L。该框架为大规模发现稀缺高价值酶和功能变体提供了稳健且通用的方案。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了一个整合系统发育分析与机器学习的酶发现流水线。核心组件包括跨界系统发育数据库、多位点发育挖掘算法、进化规模蛋白质语言模型（pLM）以及基于残基-原子接触的重评分机制。研究重点验证了其在 r-BOX 代谢途径（涉及 FadB、BktB 等酶）中的有效性。

## 为什么相关
本研究属于强 AI 交叉领域。它不仅利用了蛋白质语言模型进行功能预测，还引入了结构生物学中的原子级接触评分来优化筛选流程。对于病原基因组学而言，这种从海量未注释序列中精准挖掘功能酶的方法，可直接用于耐药基因功能鉴定或新型代谢途径的解析。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等偏低（0.25）。虽然集成了多种先进技术，但其核心逻辑仍遵循“系统发育筛选+模型预测+结构验证”的经典范式。其创新点在于将进化规模的 pLM 与多级残基-原子接触重评分相结合，并在特定工业酶靶点上超越了现有的 UniKP 模型。

## 方法与证据
1. **模型性能**：活性预测模型在 R² 指标上达到 0.68，相比 UniKP 模型，其 RMSE 降低了 11%。
2. **筛选效率**：通过多级残基-原子接触重评分，早期富集率（EF1%）显著提升了 16 倍，有效解决了高通量筛选中的假阳性问题。
3. **实验验证**：在 r-BOX 途径的 FadB 酶发现中，实验测得发酵产量达到 10.2 g/L，较初始摇瓶产量（0.65 g/L）有量级提升。

## 应用价值
该方法具有极高的工业和科研应用价值，特别是在合成生物学和代谢工程领域。它能够显著降低实验筛选的成本，提高从宏基因组数据中发现稀有、高价值酶的成功率。对于临床微生物学，该流程可用于快速识别病原体中具有特殊活性的同源蛋白。

## 局限与风险
摘要未说明该模型对非代谢类酶（如信号转导蛋白或结构蛋白）的泛化能力。此外，残基-原子接触重评分步骤可能依赖于高质量的蛋白质结构预测（如 AlphaFold），对于缺乏模板的蛋白质，其准确性可能受限。摘要亦未提及该集成流水线的计算资源消耗情况。

title: Visualize, Explore, and Select: A protein Language Model-based Approach Enabling Navigation of Protein Sequence Space for Enzyme Discovery and Mining
abstract: The rapid expansion of protein sequence databases continues to outpace functional characterization, limiting efficient enzyme discovery in large, heterogeneous, and sparsely annotated sequence spaces. Here, we present an embedding-guided framework for structured navigation of enzyme sequence space, implemented in SelectZyme. The workflow integrates protein language model embeddings with dimensionality reduction, hierarchical clustering, connectivity reconstruction, and quantitative dendrogram analysis to enable exploration without reliance on fixed sequence identity thresholds or predefined functional annotations. Across distinct case studies, we demonstrate that embedding-defined neighborhoods preserve fold-level coherence even when sequence identity resides in the twilight zone and that biologically meaningful functional organization can emerge under fully unsupervised conditions. In a large multi-family PETase landscape exceeding 100,000 sequences, the framework supports scalable, anchor-guided prioritization under sparse labeling and process-motivated constraints. By unifying latent representations with connectivity-aware and hierarchical interpretation, this approach reframes enzyme mining from threshold-driven similarity filtering into structured exploration, providing a scalable methodological foundation for hypothesisdriven biocatalyst discovery and reasonable starting points for downstream protein engineering.
abstract_zh: 蛋白质序列数据库的快速扩张远超功能鉴定速度，限制了在大型、异质且注释稀疏的序列空间中高效发现酶。本文提出 SelectZyme，一个基于嵌入引导的酶序列空间结构化导航框架。该工作流整合了蛋白质语言模型（pLM）嵌入、降维、层次聚类、连通性重建和定量树状图分析，实现了无需依赖固定序列一致性阈值或预定义功能注释的探索。通过案例研究，证明即使在序列一致性处于“黄昏区”时，嵌入定义的邻域仍能保持折叠水平的一致性，且在完全无监督条件下可涌现出具有生物学意义的功能组织。在超过 10 万条序列的大型多家族 PET 降解酶（PETase）景观中，该框架支持在稀疏标签和工艺约束下的可扩展、锚点引导优先排序。该方法将酶挖掘从阈值驱动的相似性过滤转变为结构化探索，为假设驱动的生物催化剂发现和下游蛋白质工程提供了可扩展的方法论基础。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了名为 **SelectZyme** 的计算框架，利用蛋白质语言模型（pLM）的潜在表示空间（Latent Space）来导航和挖掘酶序列。其核心逻辑是利用 AI 生成的嵌入向量（Embeddings）代替传统的序列比对得分，通过层次聚类和连通性分析，在无监督状态下识别具有相似结构或功能的酶候选者。

## 为什么相关
在病原微生物学和宏基因组学研究中，经常会发现大量功能不明的新型蛋白。传统基于 BLAST 等序列一致性的方法在处理低同源性（Twilight zone）序列时效果较差。该工具提供了一种基于 AI 语义特征的挖掘手段，可直接应用于从宏基因组数据中筛选新型耐药基因、毒力因子或具有工业价值的病原来源酶类。

## 新颖度判断
**中等偏高**。虽然 pLM 嵌入已广泛应用，但 SelectZyme 的新颖性在于其构建了一套完整的“可视化-探索-选择”工作流，特别是引入了**定量树状图分析**和**连通性重建**，试图解决高维嵌入空间在生物学解释上的直观性问题，将“黑箱”嵌入转化为可操作的层次化导航图。

## 方法与证据
- **模型与算法**：整合了蛋白质语言模型嵌入、降维技术、层次聚类及连通性重建算法。
- **数据规模**：在包含超过 **100,000 条序列**的大型多家族 PETase（聚对苯二甲酸乙二醇酯降解酶）数据集上进行了验证。
- **关键证据**：摘要指出，该方法在序列一致性极低的“黄昏区”仍能保持**折叠水平（Fold-level）的一致性**，并能在完全无监督的情况下涌现出生物学功能组织，证明了其捕捉深层进化关系的能力。

## 应用价值
- **酶挖掘**：支持在稀疏标注的大型数据库中进行可扩展的候选酶优先排序。
- **蛋白质工程**：为下游的蛋白质改造提供合理的起点序列。
- **方法论转型**：将酶发现从简单的“阈值过滤”提升为“结构化空间探索”，提高了对远源同源蛋白的识别率。

## 局限与风险
- **实验验证缺失**：摘要未说明是否对筛选出的新型 PETase 进行了体外生化实验验证，主要侧重于计算框架的有效性。
- **计算资源**：处理 10 万量级的序列嵌入和层次聚类可能对计算内存和 GPU 资源有较高要求，摘要未提及具体开销。
- **模型依赖**：其效果高度依赖于底层所使用的预训练 pLM 的质量，对于极度罕见的病原蛋白序列，模型可能存在表示偏差。

title: Machine learning predicts hepatocellular carcinoma risk from routine clinical data: a large population-based multicentric study.
abstract: Hepatocellular carcinoma (HCC) is a highly fatal tumor, for which risk stratification is crucial, yet remains challenging. Here, we develop an interpretable machine-learning framework for HCC risk stratification based on routinely collected clinical data. We utilize prospectively collected multimodal data from over 900,000 individuals and 983 cases of HCC across two population-scale cohorts: the "UK Biobank study" (development) and the "All of Us Research Program" (external testing). We assess individual and cumulative contributions of data modalities including demographics, lifestyle, health records, blood, genomics, and metabolomics. Our final, random-forest-based models significantly outperform all publicly available state-of-the-art risk-scores on both internal and external test sets. We demonstrate robustness across ethnic subgroups, provide comprehensive interpretability and release all code, model weights and a web-calculator for external validation and agentic integration. Our study presents PRE-Screen-HCC, a robust and interpretable machine-learning framework for HCC risk stratification and early detection.
abstract_zh: 肝细胞癌（HCC）是一种致死率极高的肿瘤，其风险分层至关重要但仍具挑战。本研究开发了一个基于常规临床数据的可解释机器学习框架。研究利用了来自两个大规模队列（UK Biobank 用于模型开发，All of Us Research Program 用于外部测试）的 900,000 多名个体和 983 例 HCC 病例的前瞻性多模态数据。研究评估了包括人口统计学、生活方式、健康记录、血液、基因组学和代谢组学在内的多种数据模态的个体及累积贡献。结果显示，基于随机森林的最终模型在内部和外部测试集上均显著优于现有的所有公开先进风险评分。该模型在不同族裔亚组中表现出稳健性，提供了全面的可解释性，并发布了所有代码、模型权重和用于外部验证及智能体集成的在线计算器。本研究提出的 PRE-Screen-HCC 框架为 HCC 风险分层和早期检测提供了稳健且可解释的工具。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作偏基础模型/Agent方向，可能影响病原检测任务的建模上限，值得关注其任务定义与评测设计。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究构建并验证了名为 PRE-Screen-HCC 的机器学习框架，旨在利用常规临床多模态数据进行肝细胞癌（HCC）的风险分层。研究核心在于利用超大规模（>90万个体）的队列数据，整合了从生活方式到基因组学、代谢组学的多维度信息，证明了机器学习在提升癌症早期预警准确性方面的潜力。

## 为什么相关
尽管该研究主要针对肝癌，但其在“foundation_model_agent”主题下的相关性体现在：1. **多模态数据融合**：整合了基因组学和代谢组学，这与病原生信和蛋白质组学的数据处理逻辑高度一致；2. **智能体集成（Agentic Integration）**：摘要明确提到发布了用于智能体集成的工具，暗示该模型可作为临床决策支持智能体的一个下游任务模块，为 AI Agent 在临床微生物或肿瘤诊断中的应用提供了范式。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度较高（5.25）。其创新性不在于算法本身（使用了经典的随机森林），而在于：1. **数据规模与多样性**：跨越两个国家级超大规模队列（UK Biobank 和 All of Us）；2. **全模态覆盖**：罕见地在同一框架内评估了从宏观生活方式到微观组学数据的累积贡献；3. **工程化落地**：直接提供模型权重和智能体集成接口，超越了传统的单纯论文发表。

## 方法与证据
- **模型**：基于随机森林（Random Forest）的可解释机器学习模型。
- **数据规模**：开发集来自 UK Biobank，外部测试集来自 All of Us，总计超过 900,000 名个体，包含 983 例 HCC 确诊病例。
- **输入模态**：人口统计学、生活方式、电子健康记录（EHR）、血液指标、基因组学、代谢组学。
- **结论证据**：在内外部测试集中，该模型表现均显著优于（Significantly outperform）现有的所有 SOTA 风险评分，且在不同族裔亚组中保持稳健。

## 应用价值
1. **临床筛查**：通过在线计算器实现高危人群的精准识别，辅助早期干预。
2. **科研集成**：开源的代码和模型权重允许其他研究者将其集成至更复杂的临床 AI 智能体中。
3. **多组学研究**：为如何将基因组和代谢组数据转化为临床风险预测提供了标准化路径。

## 局限与风险
- **算法局限**：摘要未说明随机森林相比于深度学习模型（如 Transformer 架构）在处理此类多模态数据时是否存在性能瓶颈。
- **病例稀疏性**：尽管总人数达 90 万，但 HCC 病例仅 983 例，数据分布极度不平衡，摘要未详细说明针对类别不平衡的具体优化策略。
- **实时性**：摘要未说明该模型在处理实时更新的临床流数据时的表现。

title: Spatial multi-omics of multiple myeloma uncovers niche-dependent pro-myeloma and immunosuppressive signaling in the bone marrow and extramedullary lesions
abstract: Multiple myeloma (MM) is a plasma cell malignancy shaped by dynamic interactions between MM cells and non-malignant cells in the immune microenvironment. To spatially profile the influence of cellular context on MM and immune cell expression, we developed a multimodal framework integrating 10x Genomics Visium HD, 10x Genomics Xenium, and clinically annotated single-cell RNA (scRNA-seq) sequencing datasets. Visium HD enabled unbiased, whole transcriptome, spatial discovery at 16 m resolution, Xenium provided orthogonal validation at single-cell resolution, and scRNA-seq extended findings by mapping spatial labels and leveraging the greater sequencing depth. We developed a custom framework for cell type annotation within Visium HD spatial bins. Our approach enabled identification of plasma cell-dense niches enriched for non-canonical Wnt signaling, associated with gene expression supporting cell adhesion mediated drug resistance, inferior progression-free survival, and extramedullary lesions. Immune cells within these neighborhoods exhibited suppressed transcriptional states, including increased inhibitory receptor expression such as LAG3. Utilizing the niche-driven transcriptional states in MM and immune cells, we were able to develop a 15-gene signature independently predictive of progression free survival (HR = 2.00, p < 0.0001). Collectively, this study demonstrates the potential of integrated spatial and single-cell transcriptomics to define niche-specific programs supporting MM progression.
abstract_zh: 多发性骨髓瘤（MM）是一种受浆细胞与免疫微环境动态相互作用影响的恶性肿瘤。为在空间维度剖析细胞背景对 MM 及免疫细胞表达的影响，本研究开发了一个整合 10x Genomics Visium HD、Xenium 及临床注释单细胞 RNA 测序（scRNA-seq）数据的多模态框架。Visium HD 实现了 16μm 分辨率下的无偏全转录组空间发现，Xenium 提供单细胞水平的正交验证，scRNA-seq 则通过映射空间标签和利用高测序深度扩展了研究发现。研究者开发了 Visium HD 空间仓位细胞注释的自定义框架，识别出富集非经典 Wnt 信号的浆细胞密集微环境（niche），该环境与细胞粘附介导的耐药、较差的无进展生存期（PFS）及髓外病变相关。此类环境中的免疫细胞表现出受抑状态，如 LAG3 等抑制性受体表达增加。基于此，研究者开发了包含 15 个基因的特征模型，可独立预测 PFS（HR = 2.00, p < 0.0001）。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究构建了一个多模态空间组学分析框架，旨在揭示多发性骨髓瘤（MM）在骨髓和髓外病变中的空间异质性。核心发现是识别出一种特定的浆细胞密集型微环境（niche），该环境通过非经典 Wnt 信号传导驱动肿瘤进展、免疫抑制（如 LAG3 表达上调）及耐药性。此外，研究利用空间驱动的转录状态开发了具有显著预后价值的 15 基因签名。

## 为什么相关
本研究在基因组学与空间组学交叉领域具有高度相关性。虽然其核心对象是肿瘤，但其开发的多模态整合流程（Visium HD + Xenium + scRNA-seq）以及针对空间仓位（spatial bins）的自定义细胞注释算法，对于病原体-宿主相互作用的空间转录组研究、临床微生物浸润分析具有重要的技术迁移价值。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度较高（0.75）。其创新点在于：1. 首次应用了 16μm 超高分辨率的 Visium HD 技术于 MM 研究；2. 实现了从全转录组发现到单细胞原位验证的闭环；3. 并非简单的空间聚类，而是通过定义“微环境驱动的转录状态”来构建临床预后模型。

## 方法与证据
- **技术栈**：10x Genomics Visium HD（16μm 分辨率，全转录组）、Xenium（单细胞原位验证）、scRNA-seq（深度测序与标签映射）。
- **关键指标**：识别出非经典 Wnt 信号通路；发现免疫抑制标志物 LAG3 在特定微环境高表达。
- **模型效能**：15 基因预后签名在独立预测无进展生存期（PFS）时，风险比（HR）达到 2.00，统计学显著性 p < 0.0001。

## 应用价值
- **临床诊断**：15 基因签名可作为 MM 患者预后分层的新工具。
- **药物研发**：识别出的非经典 Wnt 信号和细胞粘附介导的耐药机制为克服 MM 耐药提供了潜在靶点。
- **方法学**：为高分辨率空间组学数据处理提供了可借鉴的自定义注释框架。

## 局限与风险
- **弱 AI 交叉**：研究主要侧重于生物信息学流程整合与统计建模，摘要中未提及是否使用了深度学习或大语言模型（LLM）进行自动化注释或预测。
- **数据局限**：摘要未说明样本量（N）的具体规模，亦未提及该 15 基因签名在不同种族或治疗背景下的外部验证情况。
- **技术细节**：自定义细胞注释框架的具体算法逻辑在摘要中未详细说明。

title: Fingerprinting Fluorescent In Situ Hybridization Enables Multiplexed Identification of Pathogenic Bacteria.
abstract: Fluorescence in situ hybridization (FISH) is a highly specific technique for pathogenic bacteria detection that requires no culturing and provides simultaneous information on pathogenic bacteria abundance, morphology, and spatial localization. However, the limited sensitivity and poor multiplexing capacity of conventional FISH have hindered its broader application. Herein, we proposed a fingerprinting FISH (FinFISH) strategy driven by DNA self-assembly for multiplexed pathogenic bacteria detection. Using respiratory pathogens as representative models, FinFISH employs three distinct fluorophores in combinatorial labeling to generate identifiable fluorescent fingerprints for each species. In this work, FAM, Cy3, and Cy5 were selected as the fluorescent reporters because they represent well-established fluorophore combinations for multicolor imaging and combinatorial encoding, with minimal spectral overlap under standard fluorescence microscopy conditions. This strategy enables pathogen detection far beyond the limitations imposed by fluorescence channel numbers, effectively overcoming the throughput bottleneck of conventional imaging systems while offering high scalability for further expansion. Additionally, a custom-designed enclosed chip featuring multichannel reaction chambers improves parallel sample processing and simplifies experimental operation. Experimental results demonstrated that FinFISH not only performed well in identifying pathogenic bacteria within simulated sputum and urine samples but also proved applicable to clinical samples. Moreover, FinFISH provides additional semiquantitative insights into mixed infections. With future integration of expanded probe design and artificial intelligence (AI)-assisted analysis, FinFISH has the potential to advance clinical pathogenic bacteria diagnostics, microbial colocalization studies, and spatial analysis of intratumoral bacteria.
abstract_zh: 荧光原位杂交（FISH）是一种无需培养即可检测病原菌的高特异性技术，能同时提供病原菌丰度、形态和空间定位信息。然而，传统 FISH 灵敏度有限且多重检测能力不足，限制了其广泛应用。本研究提出了一种由 DNA 自组装驱动的指纹 FISH（FinFISH）策略，用于多重病原菌检测。以呼吸道病原体为模型，FinFISH 利用 FAM、Cy3 和 Cy5 三种荧光团进行组合标记，为每个物种生成独特的荧光指纹。该策略突破了荧光通道数量对检测通量的限制，克服了传统成像系统的瓶颈，具有极高的扩展性。此外，研究设计了一种具有多通道反应室的封闭式芯片，简化了实验操作并提高了并行处理能力。实验结果显示，FinFISH 在模拟痰液、尿液及临床样本中均表现出良好的识别性能，并能对混合感染提供半定量分析。未来结合 AI 辅助分析，该技术有望推进临床诊断和空间微生物组学研究。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更接近临床/监测落地，适合评估其对快速识别、预警或治疗辅助的实际价值。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究开发了一种名为 FinFISH 的新型荧光原位杂交策略，旨在解决临床病原菌检测中的多重化（Multiplexing）难题。其核心是通过 DNA 自组装技术，利用 FAM、Cy3 和 Cy5 三种标准荧光团的组合编码（Combinatorial labeling），为不同的呼吸道病原体生成特异性的“荧光指纹”，从而在有限的荧光通道下实现高通量的物种鉴定。

## 为什么相关
在临床微生物学领域，快速鉴定混合感染中的多种病原体至关重要。FinFISH 解决了传统 FISH 无法同时检测多种病原体的痛点，且无需培养，直接针对痰液和尿液样本，符合临床对快速、空间分辨检测的需求。对于病原生物信息学领域，这种组合编码产生的图像数据为后续的自动化识别提供了标准化的输入。

## 新颖度判断
中等偏高。其新颖性体现在：1. 引入 DNA 自组装驱动的指纹识别机制，打破了物理荧光通道对检测目标数量的限制；2. 开发了配套的封闭式多通道反应芯片，提升了临床样本处理的标准化程度；3. 实现了对混合感染的半定量空间分析。

## 方法与证据
- **实验对象**：以呼吸道病原体为模型，测试了模拟痰液、模拟尿液及实际临床样本。
- **技术手段**：使用 FAM、Cy3、Cy5 三种荧光报告分子进行组合编码；采用 DNA 自组装技术增强信号；使用定制封闭芯片进行并行处理。
- **证据支持**：摘要提到 FinFISH 在模拟和临床样本中均成功识别病原菌，并能提供混合感染的半定量信息。但摘要未给出具体的灵敏度（LOD）、特异性百分比或准确率数值。

## 应用价值
该技术在临床病原菌诊断、微生物空间共定位研究以及肿瘤内细菌的空间分析中具有显著潜力。其封闭式芯片设计降低了操作复杂度，适合在临床实验室推广。通过组合编码，理论上可以扩展到检测数十种病原体。

## 局限与风险
- **AI 交叉程度**：目前属于**弱 AI 交叉**。摘要中提到 AI 辅助分析仅作为“未来整合”的方向，当前研究阶段主要依赖于物理层面的组合编码和常规成像。
- **数据缺失**：摘要未说明该方法在处理复杂临床样本时的背景荧光干扰处理能力，也未提供与金标准（如 mNGS 或培养法）的对比准确率数据。
- **技术门槛**：尽管芯片简化了操作，但 DNA 自组装探针的合成成本和稳定性在临床大规模应用中仍需评估。

title: Computational Design and Atomistic Validation of a High-Affinity VHH Nanobody Targeting the PI/RuvC Interface of Streptococcus pyogenes Cas9: A Bivalent Hub Strategy for CRISPR-Cas9 Enhancement
abstract: The CRISPR-Cas9 system has revolutionized genome engineering, yet its full therapeutic potential remains constrained by challenges in precisely modulating its activity and specificity. Here we report a fully computational end-to-end pipeline for the de novo design of a single-domain VHH nanobody (NbSpCas9-v1) targeting a structurally conserved, non-catalytic epitope at the PAM-interacting (PI) and RuvC-III interface of Streptococcus pyogenes Cas9 (SpCas9; PDB: 4UN3). Nanobody sequences were generated using BoltzGen, a generative diffusion binder design framework, and co-folded with SpCas9 using Boltz-2 to evaluate structural confidence and binding affinity. The top-ranked model (SpCas9_4UN3_Bivalent_Hub_v1) achieved a complex pLDDT of 0.8406, an aggregate score of 0.8016, and an ipTM of >0.8, indicating high confidence in the nanobody antigen interface. The designed 1,616-residue quaternary complex was subjected to 10 ns of all-atom molecular dynamics simulation using the AMBER14SB force field within the GROMACS/OpenMM framework. The complex stabilized at RMSD approximately 6 Angstrom with a radius of gyration of 39 to 44 Angstrom, confirming thermodynamic stability under physiological conditions (310 K, 0.15 M NaCl). A conserved 96.3 Angstrom inter-molecular distance between the nanobody centroid and the HNH catalytic residue H840 establishes NbSpCas9-v1 as a distal, non-inhibitory binder ideally suited for a Bivalent Hub architecture recruiting secondary effectors to the Cas9 ribonucleoprotein. These results provide a rigorous structural and dynamic foundation for experimental validation of VHH-based CRISPR-Cas9 enhancers and modulators.
abstract_zh: CRISPR-Cas9 系统在基因组工程中具有革命性意义，但其活性和特异性的精确调节仍面临挑战。本研究报告了一个全计算端到端流程，用于从头设计针对化脓性链球菌 Cas9（SpCas9；PDB: 4UN3）PI 与 RuvC-III 界面非催化表位的单域 VHH 纳米抗体（NbSpCas9-v1）。研究利用生成式扩散结合物设计框架 BoltzGen 生成纳米抗体序列，并使用 Boltz-2 与 SpCas9 进行共折叠，以评估结构置信度和结合亲和力。排名最高的模型 SpCas9_4UN3_Bivalent_Hub_v1 的复合体 pLDDT 达到 0.8406，综合评分为 0.8016，ipTM > 0.8，表明界面置信度极高。对包含 1,616 个残基的四元复合体进行了 10 ns 的全原子分子动力学模拟，结果显示复合体在 RMSD 约 6 Å 处趋于稳定，证明了其在生理条件下的热力学稳定性。纳米抗体质心与 HNH 催化残基 H840 之间保持 96.3 Å 的距离，确立了 NbSpCas9-v1 作为远端非抑制性结合物的地位，适用于招募次级效应因子的二价枢纽架构。
why_it_matters: 这篇工作更像方法创新，可能直接关联 metagenomics、long-read 或 pathogen identification 流程优化。
analysis_zh:
## 核心内容
该研究展示了一个完全依赖计算手段的端到端流程，旨在设计一种针对化脓性链球菌 Cas9 (SpCas9) 的高亲和力 VHH 纳米抗体（NbSpCas9-v1）。其核心目标是开发一种“二价枢纽（Bivalent Hub）”策略，通过纳米抗体结合在 Cas9 的非催化界面（PI/RuvC），在不干扰 Cas9 原有切割功能的前提下，为招募其他功能效应因子提供物理位点。

## 为什么相关
本研究属于 AI 与蛋白质工程的强交叉领域。对于病原生信和临床微生物学而言，SpCas9 源自重要致病菌 *S. pyogenes*，对其工具化的改造直接影响基因编辑效率及病原体检测技术的灵敏度。此外，该工作利用了最新的生成式 AI 模型（BoltzGen/Boltz-2），展示了如何通过计算手段预先筛选针对特定病原蛋白的结合模块。

## 新颖度判断
新颖度中等偏低（0.25）。虽然使用了较新的 Boltz 系列模型，但针对 Cas9 设计纳米抗体的思路在学术界已有类似尝试。其主要创新点在于明确提出了针对 PI/RuvC 界面的“非抑制性”设计，并通过计算验证了其作为二价枢纽的结构可行性，而非传统的抑制性抗体设计。

## 方法与证据
1. **AI 设计框架**：使用生成式扩散模型 **BoltzGen** 进行从头序列生成，并利用 **Boltz-2** 进行共折叠预测。
2. **关键指标**：模型 SpCas9_4UN3_Bivalent_Hub_v1 表现出高置信度，**pLDDT 为 0.8406**，**ipTM > 0.8**，**综合评分 0.8016**。
3. **动力学验证**：在 GROMACS/OpenMM 环境下使用 **AMBER14SB 力场** 进行 **10 ns** 全原子分子动力学模拟。复合体 **RMSD 稳定在 ~6 Å**，回转半径（Rg）在 **39-44 Å** 之间。
4. **功能定位**：测得纳米抗体质心与催化活性位点 **H840 距离为 96.3 Å**，从空间结构上证明了其不会干扰 Cas9 的酶促反应。

## 应用价值
该研究为 CRISPR-Cas9 系统的功能扩展提供了新工具。NbSpCas9-v1 可作为“适配器”，用于构建多功能融合蛋白（如碱基编辑器、转录激活因子），且由于其结合位点远离催化中心，能够保持 Cas9 的高切割活性。这在开发高性能病原体检测工具或精准基因治疗药物方面具有潜在价值。

## 局限与风险
1. **模拟时间极短**：10 ns 的分子动力学模拟对于评估蛋白质复合体的长期稳定性和构象变化而言显著不足，通常需要百纳秒甚至微秒级模拟。
2. **缺乏湿实验验证**：摘要未提及任何体外（In vitro）结合实验（如 SPR 或 BLI）或细胞内功能实验，所有结论均基于计算预测。
3. **特异性未知**：摘要未说明该纳米抗体是否会与其它物种的 Cas9 蛋白（如 SaCas9）产生交叉反应，这在临床应用中可能带来脱靶风险。
